name: Holidays
short_description: In this interactive adventure, you play as a teacher suffering from delirium tremens. A world will open before you where every choice you make matters. Explore different locations, engage in battles, make decisions that will correspond to your desires and moral principles.
detailed_description:
In this interactive adventure, you play as a teacher suffering from delirium tremens. A world will open before you where every choice you make matters. Explore different locations, engage in battles, make decisions that will correspond to your desires and moral principles. Go on a shopping spree where you can purchase a variety of items that will then be used in your adventure. Have fun by going bowling or going to the cinema.
The game offers 18 different outcomes, each of which is a unique ending to your journey. One of the endings will not only complete your current story, but will also unlock a new character with whom you can begin your next adventure.
